sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
update TransX set BusCat = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, CC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, TTY, TransCode, ProdCode, AccYr, ReinName, ReinLoc, Stat, CatCode, Broker, RiskTerr, PTF, Amt1, PK) (Select KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, CC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, TTY, TransCode, ProdCode, AccYr, ReinName, ReinLoc, Stat, CatCode, Broker, RiskTerr, PTF, round(-sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1,  '50' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 > 0 and PK is NULL group by KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, CC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, TTY, TransCode, ProdCode, AccYr, ReinName, ReinLoc, Stat, CatCode, Broker, RiskTerr, PTF)

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, CC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, TTY, TransCode, ProdCode, AccYr, ReinName, ReinLoc, Stat, CatCode, Broker, RiskTerr, PTF, Amt1, PK) (Select KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, CC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, TTY, TransCode, ProdCode, AccYr, ReinName, ReinLoc, Stat, CatCode, Broker, RiskTerr, PTF, round(-sum(coalesce(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1,  '40' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 < 0 and PK is NULL group by KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, CC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, TTY, TransCode, ProdCode, AccYr, ReinName, ReinLoc, Stat, CatCode, Broker, RiskTerr, PTF)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, CC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, TTY, TransCode, ProdCode, AccYr, ReinName, ReinLoc, Stat, CatCode, Broker, RiskTerr, PTF, Amt1, PK) (Select KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Co, (substring(GL,1,3) + '00' + substring(GL,6,2)) as GL, Crcy, '' as TP, PC, CC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, TTY, TransCode, ProdCode, AccYr, ReinName, ReinLoc, Stat, CatCode, Broker, RiskTerr, PTF, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1,'50' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '40' and substring(GL,4,2) = '89' and TP <> '' )

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, CC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, TTY, TransCode, ProdCode, AccYr, ReinName, ReinLoc, Stat, CatCode, Broker, RiskTerr, PTF, Amt1, PK) (Select KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Co, (substring(GL,1,3) + '00' + substring(GL,6,2)) as GL, Crcy, '' as TP, PC, CC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, TTY, TransCode, ProdCode, AccYr, ReinName, ReinLoc, Stat, CatCode, Broker, RiskTerr, PTF, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1,'40' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '50' and substring(GL,4,2) = '89' and TP <> '')

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, CC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, TTY, TransCode, ProdCode, AccYr, ReinName, ReinLoc, Stat, CatCode, Broker, RiskTerr, PTF, Amt1, PK) (Select KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Co, GL, Crcy, '' as TP, PC, CC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, TTY, TransCode, ProdCode, AccYr, ReinName, ReinLoc, Stat, CatCode, Broker, RiskTerr, PTF, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1,'50' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '40' and substring(GL,4,2) <> '89' and TP <> '')

insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, CC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, TTY, TransCode, ProdCode, AccYr, ReinName, ReinLoc, Stat, CatCode, Broker, RiskTerr, PTF, Amt1, PK) (Select KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Co, GL, Crcy, '' as TP, PC, CC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, TTY, TransCode, ProdCode, AccYr, ReinName, ReinLoc, Stat, CatCode, Broker, RiskTerr, PTF, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1,'40' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '50' and substring(GL,4,2) <> '89' and TP <> '')
update TransX set Flex6 = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex5 = 'TP reclass for Zenith' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, YearPeriod, Yr, Period, Co, GL, Crcy, TP, PC, BusCat, Contract, UWYR, TTY, TransCode, ProdCode, AccYr, ReinName, ReinLoc, Stat, CatCode, Broker, RiskTerr, PTF, Amt1) values ('[batchID]','[Yr][Mo]',[Yr],[Mo],
